productDisplayName: Fossil Men Quartz Black Dial Chronograph Watch FS4682
description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a round case with a fixed bezel, has a stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has hands and markingsFeatures: A screw to reset the time, three-faced chronograph display, two push buttons to reset time, a date apertureStrap style: Black steel strap, secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 50 metresComes in a signature Fossil caseWarranty: 2 years warranty against manufacturing defects
